name: Fitness Tracking & Customization
description: User feedback and feature requests regarding fitness tracking accuracy, social connectivity, and device customization for a wearable product.

name: Battery, Connectivity & Lag
description: Performance issues including rapid battery drain, unstable connectivity, and software lag.

name: Privacy & Multi-User Support
description: Inquiries and concerns regarding multi-user support, mandatory account registration privacy, and product value.

name: Support & Setup Experience
description: Feedback highlights issues with customer support responsiveness and accessibility, alongside concerns about a complicated setup process.

name: Notification Settings
description: Requests for more customizable, intelligent, and readable notification settings and features.

name: Water Resistance Reliability
description: User inquiries and feedback regarding the reliability and accuracy of the device's water resistance capabilities.

name: Mixed & Neutral Sentiment
description: Mediocre and lukewarm feedback reflecting indifferent or underwhelming sentiments.

name: Health Data Security
description: Inquiries regarding the security of personal health data storage.

name: Subscriptions & Update Regressions
description: Users are frustrated with features being locked behind premium subscriptions and software updates that break existing functionality.
